scripts.db:generate: SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION=1 BETTER_AUTH_URL=${BETTER_AUTH_URL:?Set BETTER_AUTH_URL} CORS_ORIGIN=${CORS_ORIGIN:?Set CORS_ORIGIN} BETTER_AUTH_SECRET=${BETTER_AUTH_SECRET:?Set BETTER_AUTH_SECRET} DATABASE_URL=${DATABASE_URL:?Set DATABASE_URL} better-auth generate --config ../auth/src/index.ts --output src/schema/auth.ts --yes && drizzle-kit generate
